bestiary.notes: Goblin Pack are vulnerable to iron weapons.
Shadow Stalker are vulnerable to silver weapons.
Elder Dragon are vulnerable to blessed weapons.
Cave Troll are vulnerable to steel weapons.
Shadow Wolf are vulnerable to iron weapons.
Bone Colossus are vulnerable to obsidian weapons.
Vampire Lord are vulnerable to silver weapons.
Wraith Knight are vulnerable to enchanted weapons.
Basilisk are vulnerable to obsidian weapons.
Lich are vulnerable to crystal weapons.
Griffon are vulnerable to steel weapons.
Hydra are vulnerable to blessed weapons.
Phoenix are vulnerable to crystal weapons.
Chimera are vulnerable to obsidian weapons.
Golem are vulnerable to iron weapons.
